text:
There once was a shy squirrel named Oliver. Every morning he'd sneak past the ducks into the sunflower fields. Once he climbed up the tallest sunflower. He fell. Just a knack for spinning.

One day he met Ruby. They talked about stars. He learned stars shine not just here. Maybe somewhere far. Dreamed.

Stars shined. But not where he hoped. Back home. He sighed. But then he saw it. Rainbows.

Rainbows! They linked. With clouds. Close.

With courage. He soared. Rainbow dreams.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
